𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
X : ι → Ω → E
inst✝⁵ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝⁴ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝³ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝² : 𝓕.HasUsualConditions P
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
hX :

⊢ ∀ᵐ (ω : Ω) ∂P, Function.RightContinuous fun x => X x ω

    intro j hj
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le (hle.trans' hj)]
    exact Set.indicator_of_mem hpos (X j) ω
  rw [Function.RightContinuous] at hsp ⊢
  have hcont := hsp i
  simp only [nhdsWithin] at hcont ⊢
  refine Filter.Tendsto.congr' ?_ hcont
  rw [Filter.eventuallyEq_iff_exists_mem]
  refine ⟨Set.Icc i (hX.localSeq n ω).untop (WithTop.lt_top_iff_ne_top.mp (hn n le_rfl)), ?_, ?_⟩
  · exact Filter.inter_mem_inf (Filter.mem_principal_self _) 
      (Filter.Icc_mem_nhds le_rfl (WithTop.coe_lt_iff.mpr ⟨_, hn n le_rfl, le_rfl⟩))
  · intro j hj
    rw [heq j hj.1, heq i le_rfl]

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  intro i
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := hω i
  have hτ_pos : ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω := lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le (hn n le_rfl)
  have hsp := hX.stoppedProcess n ω
  rw [Function.RightContinuous] at hsp ⊢
  have hi_lt : i < hX.localSeq n ω := hn n le_rfl
  have : ∀ᶠ j in 𝓝[>] i, j < hX.localSeq n ω := by
    apply Filter.eventually_of_mem (s := Set.Iio (hX.localSeq n ω))
    · exact Iio_mem_nhdsWithin_Ioi ⟨le_refl i, hi_lt⟩
    · exact fun _ h ↦ h
  apply Tendsto.congr' _ hsp
  filter_upwards [this] with j hj
  simp only [stoppedProcess, min_eq_left (le_of_lt hj), Set.indicator_of_mem, Set.mem_setOf_eq, hτ_pos]

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω t
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hω t
  have hpos : ⊥ < hX.localSeq N ω := bot_lt_iff_ne_bot.mpr (by
    intro h
    simp only [h, not_lt_bot] at hN
    exact hN N le_rfl)
  have hstop := hX.stoppedProcess N ω
  have ht_lt : (t : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq N ω := hN N le_rfl
  rw [Function.RightContinuous] at hstop ⊢
  have : stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < hX.localSeq N ω}.indicator (X i)) (hX.localSeq N) t ω = X t ω := by
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le ht_lt.le, Set.indicator_of_mem]
    exact hpos
  rw [← this]
  apply Filter.Tendsto.congr' _ (hstop t)
  rw [Filter.eventuallyEq_iff_exists_mem]
  refine ⟨Set.Ici t, Ici_mem_nhdsWithin_Ici le_rfl, fun s hs ↦ ?_⟩
  have hs_lt : (s : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq N ω := lt_of_le_of_lt (WithTop.coe_le_coe.mpr hs) ht_lt
  rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le hs_lt.le, Set.indicator_of_mem]
  exact hpos

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  intro i
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := hω i
  have hτ : hX.localSeq n ω = ⊤ := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := WithTop.ne_top_iff_exists.mp h
    specialize hn n le_rfl
    rw [← hj] at hn
    exact not_lt.mpr (WithTop.coe_le_coe.mpr (le_refl j)) hn
  have hrc := hX.stoppedProcess n ω i
  simp only [stoppedProcess, hτ, min_eq_left_iff, le_top, ↓reduceIte] at hrc
  convert hrc using 1
  ext j
  simp only [Set.indicator_apply, Set.mem_setOf_eq, hτ, WithTop.bot_lt_coe, ↓reduceIte]

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω i
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := hω i
  specialize hn n le_rfl
  have hpos : ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω := bot_lt_iff_ne_bot.mpr (fun h => by simp_all)
  have hrc := hX.stoppedProcess n ω i
  simp only [stoppedProcess, Set.indicator_of_mem (Set.mem_setOf.mpr hpos)] at hrc
  have hi_lt : (i : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq n ω := hn
  rw [min_eq_left hi_lt.le] at hrc
  exact hrc.congr (eventually_of_mem (Ioi_mem_nhds i) fun j hj => by
    simp only [stoppedProcess, Set.indicator_of_mem (Set.mem_setOf.mpr hpos)]
    rw [min_eq_left (hj.le.trans hi_lt.le)])

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  intro i
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ : ∃ n, i < hX.localSeq n ω := by
    rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hω i
    exact ⟨N, hN N le_rfl⟩
  have hpos : ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω := lt_trans bot_lt_coe hn
  have hstop := hX.stoppedProcess n ω
  rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le (le_of_lt hn), Set.indicator_of_mem (Set.mem_setOf.mpr hpos)] at hstop
  exact hstop i

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  intro i
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hω i
  have hbot : ⊥ < hX.localSeq N ω := lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le (hN N le_rfl)
  have hstop := hX.stoppedProcess N ω
  have hi_lt : i < hX.localSeq N ω := hN N le_rfl
  rw [Function.RightContinuous] at hstop ⊢
  have heq : ∀ j ≤ i, stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < hX.localSeq N ω}.indicator (X i)) 
      (hX.localSeq N) j ω = X j ω := by
    intro j hj
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le (le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt hj hi_lt)), 
        Set.indicator_of_mem (Set.mem_setOf.mpr hbot)]
  specialize hstop i
  simp only [heq i le_rfl] at hstop
  refine Filter.Tendsto.congr' ?_ hstop
  filter_upwards [Filter.eventually_le_nhds hi_lt] with j hj
  exact heq j (le_of_lt hj)

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω i
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := hω i
  have hτn := hn n le_rfl
  have hrc := hX.stoppedProcess n ω i
  simp only [stoppedProcess, Set.indicator] at hrc
  split_ifs at hrc with h
  · convert hrc using 1
    ext j
    simp only [stoppedProcess, Set.indicator]
    split_ifs with h'
    · simp only [min_eq_left_iff]
      exact fun hji ↦ hji.trans (le_of_lt hτn)
    · rfl
  · exact (h (bot_lt_iff_ne_bot.mpr (WithTop.coe_ne_bot.mp (ne_bot_of_gt hτn)))).elim

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  intro i
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hω i
  have hτ : ⊥ < hX.localSeq N ω := lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le (hN N le_rfl)
  have hstop := hX.stoppedProcess N ω
  have hi_lt : i < hX.localSeq N ω := hN N le_rfl
  rw [Function.RightContinuous] at hstop ⊢
  have heq : ∀ j, j ≤ i → stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < hX.localSeq N ω}.indicator (X i))
      (hX.localSeq N) j ω = X j ω := by
    intro j hj
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le (hi_lt.trans_le' (WithTop.coe_le_coe.mpr hj)).le,
        Set.indicator_of_mem]
    exact hτ
  specialize hstop i
  simp only [heq i le_rfl] at hstop
  refine Filter.Tendsto.congr' ?_ hstop
  filter_upwards [Filter.eventually_gt_nhds i] with j hj
  exact (heq j hj.le).symm

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hω ⊥
  have hτN : ⊥ < hX.localSeq N ω := hN N le_rfl
  have hstop := hX.stoppedProcess N ω
  intro i
  have hi : i ≤ hX.localSeq N ω := le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt (WithTop.coe_le_coe.mpr bot_le) hτN)
  convert hstop i using 1
  rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le hi, Set.indicator_of_mem]
  exact hτN
